name: Myover, James A.
description: After serving Uncle Sam in the Navy, "Jim" came here to prepare himself to serve Arkansas. We know that he will not fail.
text: After serving Uncle Sam in the Navy, "Jim" came here to prepare himself to serve Arkansas. We know that he will not fail.

name: Vaughan, Veda
description: Any organization or meeting is not complete without Veda. Her sweet, sweet personality has won her many friends.
text: Any organization or meeting is not complete without Veda. Her sweet, sweet personality has won her many friends.

name: Nolen, Roy A.
description: Roy is a willing student, his presence has raised the standard of the Senior Class. He hailed from the U. S. Navy in 1919, after serving through the World War.
text: Roy is a willing student, his presence has raised the standard of the Senior Class. He hailed from the U. S. Navy in 1919, after serving through the World War.

name: Stanley, Frank R.
clubs: Vice President Lee Debating Society (2nd term)
description: "Slats" is one of the most popular young men in school. He is ready at all times to lend a willing hand to help someone. We wish him success.
text: "Slats" is one of the most popular young men in school. He is ready at all times to lend a willing hand to help someone. We wish him success.

name: Wilkins, Harden
description: Wilkins is an ardent believer in outdoor exercises. He and his pet bull pup take long hikes every morning.
text: Wilkins is an ardent believer in outdoor exercises. He and his pet bull pup take long hikes every morning.

name: Parkinson, Sarah
description: Sarah, who is your pal? She can always be counted upon to do her share of class activities.
text: Sarah, who is your pal? She can always be counted upon to do her share of class activities.

name: Putman, John J.
description: Ambition rules his brain, and love his heart. "Johnnie" is great in "Stump speeches." He has been a leader in the school activities and will be greatly missed next year.
text: Ambition rules his brain, and love his heart. "Johnnie" is great in "Stump speeches." He has been a leader in the school activities and will be greatly missed next year.

name: Westerfield, Carrie Lee
description: Her personality is her fortune. Carrie Lee has a wonderful voice. We expect great things to come from her musical ability.
text: Her personality is her fortune. Carrie Lee has a wonderful voice. We expect great things to come from her musical ability.

name: Fortner, Ada Mai
description: Although she excels in expression, her talents are not limited to that work. Ada goes about with a smile, spreading sunshine.
text: Although she excels in expression, her talents are not limited to that work. Ada goes about with a smile, spreading sunshine.

name: Powers, E. Denton
description: Denton is a favorite among the girls and delights in being in their presence. He is almost a pet of our school and will doubtless be missed next year.
text:
"It's the little things that count."
Denton is a favorite among the girls and delights in being in their presence. He is almost a pet of our school and will doubtless be missed next year.

name: Shoptaw, Ruth
description: Ruth is thorough, efficient and able. In school she is studious and sincere.
text: Ruth is thorough, efficient and able. In school she is studious and sincere.

name: Pruett, Ben Frank
description: If you are looking for a man who knows his own business and attends to it, Ben is the one you want. He is fond of livestock and delights in working with them.
text: If you are looking for a man who knows his own business and attends to it, Ben is the one you want. He is fond of livestock and delights in working with them.

name: Ellis, E. Lauhon
clubs: Vice President, Lee Debating Society (1st Term)
description: Tall and handsome; what else could you ask? He has made "Aggie" a good student.
text: Tall and handsome; what else could you ask? He has made "Aggie" a good student.

name: Harrell, Euna
description: The basket ball team was fortunate in having Euna. She is an all round girl.
text: The basket ball team was fortunate in having Euna. She is an all round girl.

name: Farris, Emory
description: A job is never too large to try or never too small to do his best on, with Emory. He does not shirk his duty when called upon to do anything.
text: A job is never too large to try or never too small to do his best on, with Emory. He does not shirk his duty when called upon to do anything.

name: McIlroy, Maud
description: Maud's task is to "feed 'em", and in this as well as in other undertakings she excels.
text: Maud's task is to "feed 'em", and in this as well as in other undertakings she excels.

name: Agnew, Mary Elizabeth
description: Mary revels in long walks. She is one of our best students in the D. A. Department. Boys, look out for her, she can make shirts.
text: Mary revels in long walks. She is one of our best students in the D. A. Department. Boys, look out for her, she can make shirts.

name: Claxton, Douglas
description: Since Doug is slender, black of hair, with brilliant eyes, he is very attractive to the fair sex.
text: Since Doug is slender, black of hair, with brilliant eyes, he is very attractive to the fair sex.

name: Hoppins, Elmer
description: Elmer is earnest in his work and strives to beat his own records. We can count his friends by the number that know him.
text: Elmer is earnest in his work and strives to beat his own records. We can count his friends by the number that know him.

name: Claxton, William
description: Although he hails from afar, we are proud to have him within our ranks. This is his first year, but he is well known.
text: Although he hails from afar, we are proud to have him within our ranks. This is his first year, but he is well known.

name: Thompson, J. Paul
description: Paul is our "song bird." He is a good student, taking part in all activities.
text: Paul is our "song bird." He is a good student, taking part in all activities.

name: Linderman, Earl
description: Although a new member of the class, he has proven himself a worthy one. We predict a bright future for him.
text: Although a new member of the class, he has proven himself a worthy one. We predict a bright future for him.

name: Stokes, George W.
description: It is easy to make "A's" but they are hard to keep, thinks George. He has become an accomplished "Ford" driver during his stay at Aggie.
text: It is easy to make "A's" but they are hard to keep, thinks George. He has become an accomplished "Ford" driver during his stay at Aggie.

name: Newman, D. Autrey
description: As firm as the "Rock of Gibraltar" he faces all obstacles. Newman is self-confident and pushes forward regardless of opposition.
text: As firm as the "Rock of Gibraltar" he faces all obstacles. Newman is self-confident and pushes forward regardless of opposition.

name: Norman Whaley
motto: "Hard work is the key to success."
description: He is, indeed, a busy man.
text:
"Hard work is the key to success."
He is, indeed, a busy man.
